name: Update Tests on Source Change
description: When a source file is edited, check if a corresponding test file exists and prompt to update it

then.prompt: A source file was just edited. Check if a corresponding test file exists (e.g. src/foo.ts → src/foo.test.ts or tests/foo.test.ts). If it does, review the changes made to the source file and update the test file to reflect them: add tests for new functions or branches, update tests for changed signatures, and remove tests for deleted code. If no test file exists yet, do nothing — do not create one automatically.
